parsed.final_response: It's like the tasks are piling up and you're searching for a sense of control, even in your reflection. You mention feeling like you're drowning in bills and your dad's care, and that's a really heavy burden to carry. I can see how that would make you wonder if you're good enough, even though you've handled so much before. It takes a lot of courage to admit when we're feeling overwhelmed like this.

parsed.final_response: You're dealing with a lot right now, from bills to your dad's care, and on top of that, you're putting a lot of pressure on yourself to be 'good enough.' It sounds like every new task that comes up makes you feel like you're losing control. I want you to know that I see you, and I see how hard you're trying.
